metadata.description: Agent skills organised into buckets by domain.

plugins.name: everything
plugins.description: All public-facing skills in this repository across every domain bucket.

plugins.name: drafting-skills
plugins.description: Skills for writing and editing content: emails, documents, reports, and other written output.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: Skills for software development tasks: code review, debugging, architecture, and technical workflows.

plugins.name: productivity-skills
plugins.description: Skills for general workplace productivity: summarisation, research, meeting prep, and task management.

plugins.name: problem-solving-skills
plugins.description: Skills for working through a hard problem or decision: reasoning from fundamentals, or debating between competing options.

plugins.name: roles-skills
plugins.description: Skills that adopt a fixed persona or stance to sharpen thinking: an advocate, a listener, a critic.

plugins.name: ui-ux-skills
plugins.description: Skills for user interface and experience design: dashboards, visual design, and usability.

plugins.name: output-styles
plugins.description: Skills that shift Claude's communication tone and voice.

plugins.name: meta-skills
plugins.description: Meta-skills: skills about authoring, vetting, and evaluating skills themselves.

plugins.name: personal-skills
plugins.description: Skills for personal productivity and life admin: scheduling, decision-making, and personal organisation.
